title: Danielle’s Robinson CV
text:
Physicist, Mathematician, Cambridge professor.

isaac@applesdofall.org | My wikipedia page  | Download PDF



Student at Brigham Young University-Idaho, studying Data Science and Communications



Data Science
Communications
Dance





2021-2025 Thunder Ridge High School, Ammon, Idaho
2023-2025 College Of Southern Idaho - Associate of Liberal Arts September 2025-Now Brigham Young University-Idaho - Bachelor of Science in Data Science - Minor in Communications



07/2020 – 04/2022
Idaho Falls Wood‑n‑Crafts, Idaho Falls, ID
- Customer Service / Cashier
- Supported customers through the purchasing process and product location.
- Answered customer calls with efficiency and friendliness.
- Organized and replenished merchandise for an appealing sales floor.
- Maintained a clean, professional, and inviting work environment.
05/2024 – 02/2025
Buckle Youth, Idaho Falls, ID
- Customer Service / Cashier
- Delivered exceptional customer service and memorable shopping experiences.
- Leveraged strong product knowledge to drive sales and mentor team members.
- Maintained professionalism and leadership in the manager’s absence.
- Guided customers in purchase decisions with personalized recommendations.
- Trained new staff on engagement strategies and sales techniques.
